ham.subject: Out of Office: [Name] – Returning on [date]
ham.body:
Hello Team,

I will be out of the office from Monday, 15 June to Friday, 19 June and will have limited access to email. I will respond to your message when I return.

If you need immediate assistance, please contact Sarah Johnson (sarah.johnson@company.com) or call extension 1234.

Thank you,
[Name]

spam.subject: Urgent: Your Microsoft 365 Password Expires in 24 Hours – Action Required
spam.body:
Dear [Employee Name],

We have detected that your Microsoft 365 account password is set to expire within the next 24 hours. To ensure uninterrupted access to your email, documents, and collaboration tools, please reset your password immediately.

Click the link below to reset your password securely:

<URL>

If you do not update your password within 24 hours, your account will be disabled and you will lose access to all company resources. For any assistance, contact IT Support at it-support@company.com.

Thank you for your prompt attention to this matter.

Best regards,
Microsoft 365 Security Team
